title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: Kalshi, founded by Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara, built a regulated financial exchange for real-world events over four years of regulatory battles, including a lawsuit against government overseers. The startup achieved a $22 billion valuation by positioning itself as a market for truth rather than gambling, scaling 100x within four weeks after gaining regulatory approval.
